description: Customer data source may not meet latency SLA required for real-time analytics
rationale: Spike chosen to cap potential 6-week rework risk; proceed vs wait evaluated

description: SOC 2 control validation may delay production release
rationale: Controls pulled forward in schedule to remove as a release gate

description: Parallel dev tracks may cause rework if data ingestion slips
rationale: Rework cost modeled lower than cost of delaying feature start; buffer retained

description: Mid-implementation request to add analytics dimension not in SOW
rationale: DTA showed asymmetric downside if accepted mid-stream; deferred to Phase 2

description: Incomplete monitoring config could mask early production issues
rationale: Failure modes reviewed pre-launch; runbooks updated with alert thresholds

description: OAuth2 token rotation window unknown — may cause silent auth failures
rationale: Early validation spike scheduled Sprint 1; cheaper than downstream debugging

description: PII data masking approach unvalidated before ingestion pipeline build
rationale: Legal review gate added before ingestion work begins

description: HIPAA audit trail requirements not fully scoped in initial SOW
rationale: Audit trail requirements added to acceptance criteria before dev started

description: Customer will provide complete data schema documentation by kickoff
rationale: Historical integrations show ~40% schema delay rate; escalation path defined
notes: Escalate if schema incomplete at T-3

description: Source files are UTF-8 encoded — encoding inconsistency found in 2 files
rationale: Encoding sweep added to discovery checklist; 2 anomalies already surfaced

description: IdP certificate valid through Q3 — expiry in 11 days discovered in discovery
rationale: Cert renewal ticket raised with BankFirst IT; blocking SSO completion

description: Source data schema is stable and will not change during implementation
rationale: Schema confirmed stable by LogiTrack data team; signed off in discovery

description: EduPath IT team available and responsive for discovery call participation
rationale: EduPath confirmed availability; discovery session scheduled Day 3

description: Standard client portal template applies without customization
rationale: Contract scope review in progress; portal access unclear in current SOW

description: Firewall ticket blocking API access validation — open 4 days with no response
rationale: WIP age flagged; escalated to FinServ Co network team and account exec

description: IdP cert expires in 11 days — renewal not yet initiated by client IT
rationale: Raised in standup; renewal ticket created; BankFirst IT engaged

description: 3 SOC 2 control areas have no assigned owner — audit evidence blocked
rationale: Control owner gap flagged to CISO; assignments requested within 48h

description: File encoding inconsistency caused ingestion failure in dev environment
rationale: Encoding normalization added to pipeline; retested and passing

description: Multi-tenant caching edge case found — tenant data isolation not guaranteed
rationale: Fix in PR review; blocking audit sign-off; reviewer assigned

description: Third-party analytics API rate limits undocumented — spike required
rationale: Early spike scheduled Sprint 1; throttling fix cheaper upstream

description: Executive KPI dashboard blocked on Schema Validation Framework completion
rationale: Sequenced in Kanban; Schema Framework in Ready for Execution

description: CS onboarding blocked on platform deployment sign-off
rationale: Platform deployed; CS onboarding unblocked

description: Discovery cannot advance until SOW scope is formally confirmed by sales
rationale: Sales transfer call scheduled; SOW review in progress

description: Model training cannot begin until data validation pipeline is complete
rationale: Validation pipeline in Discovery; blocking model work; sequenced on board
